message:
fix(scheduler): replace misleading error logs with design-intent comments

The foreign-pinned-waiter-without-cached-waker path in Worker::execute
logged error!("wake skipped") which suggested a bug, but the behavior
is intentional: pinned tasks that haven't been polled yet have their
notify state cleared so the next proper wake (through their owning
worker) isn't dedup-suppressed. Replace the error logs with comments
explaining the design decision. Also removes the now-unused `error`
import from tracing_compat.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
